mapper.sql: spssi.id, spssi.group_id, spssi.employee_id, spssi.income_period, spssi.work_card, spssi.employee_name, spssi.overtime_pay, spssi.holiday_overtime_pay, spssi.rest_overtime_pay, spssi.operation_code, spssi.error_msg, spssi.data_status, spssi.attribute1, spssi.attribute2, spssi.attribute3, spssi.attribute4, spssi.attribute5, spssi.attribute6, spssi.attribute7, spssi.attribute8, spssi.attribute9, spssi.create_time, spssi.create_by, spssi.update_time, spssi.update_by, spssi.deduct_income_tax, round(spssi.safety_accumulation_award, 2) as safety_accumulation_award, round(spssi.high_temperature_subsidy, 2) as high_temperature_subsidy, round(spssi.allowance_deduction, 2) as allowance_deduction, round(spssi.deduct_other, 2) as deduct_other, spssi.overtime_pay_time, spssi.holiday_overtime_pay_time, spssi.rest_overtime_pay_time, round(spssi.transportation_allowance, 2) as transportation_allowance, round(spssi.deduct_hydropower_house, 2) as deduct_hydropower_house

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.group_id as ${tAlias}_group_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.income_period as ${tAlias}_income_period, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.overtime_pay as ${tAlias}_overtime_pay, ${tAlias}.holiday_overtime_pay as ${tAlias}_holiday_overtime_pay, ${tAlias}.rest_overtime_pay as ${tAlias}_rest_overtime_pay, ${tAlias}.operation_code as ${tAlias}_operation_code, ${tAlias}.error_msg as ${tAlias}_error_msg, ${tAlias}.data_status as ${tAlias}_data_status, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.attribute6 as ${tAlias}_attribute6, ${tAlias}.attribute7 as ${tAlias}_attribute7, ${tAlias}.attribute8 as ${tAlias}_attribute8, ${tAlias}.attribute9 as ${tAlias}_attribute9, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.deduct_income_tax as ${tAlias}_deduct_income_tax, ${tAlias}.safety_accumulation_award as ${tAlias}_safety_accumulation_award, ${tAlias}.high_temperature_subsidy as ${tAlias}_high_temperature_subsidy, ${tAlias}.allowance_deduction as ${tAlias}_allowance_deduction, ${tAlias}.deduct_other as ${tAlias}_deduct_other, ${tAlias}.overtime_pay_time as ${tAlias}_overtime_pay_time, ${tAlias}.holiday_overtime_pay_time as ${tAlias}_holiday_overtime_pay_time, ${tAlias}.rest_overtime_pay_time as ${tAlias}_rest_overtime_pay_time, ${tAlias}.transportation_allowance as ${tAlias}_transportation_allowance, ${tAlias}.deduct_hydropower_house as ${tAlias}_deduct_hydropower_house
mapper.insert:
insert into swm_post_skill_salary_interface( group_id, employee_id, income_period, work_card, employee_name, overtime_pay, holiday_overtime_pay, rest_overtime_pay, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, deduct_income_tax, safety_accumulation_award, high_temperature_subsidy, allowance_deduction, deduct_other, transportation_allowance, deduct_hydropower_house, special_import_flag ) select #{groupId, jdbcType= BIGINT},ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ), #{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ), #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{overtimePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{holidayOvertimePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{restOvertimePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, 'C', CASE
WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN '工号匹配失败' ELSE case when not exists (select 1 from swm_post_skill_salary spss where spss.enabled_flag = 1 and spss.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isnull(spss.frozen_flag, 0) = 0) then '所得期间已冻结或不存在' else '' end END, CASE
WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN 'F' ELSE
case when not exists (select 1 from swm_post_skill_salary spss where spss.enabled_flag = 1 and spss.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isnull(spss.frozen_flag, 0) = 0) then 'F' else 'T' end
END, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deductIncomeTax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{safetyAccumulationAward, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{highTemperatureSubsidy, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{allowanceDeduction, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{deductOther, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{transportationAllowance, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{deductHydropowerHouse, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, 1

INSERT INTO swm_post_skill_salary_interface ( group_id, employee_id, income_period, work_card, employee_name, overtime_pay, holiday_overtime_pay, rest_overtime_pay, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, deduct_income_tax, safety_accumulation_award, high_temperature_subsidy, allowance_deduction, deduct_other, overtime_pay_time, holiday_overtime_pay_time, rest_overtime_pay_time, transportation_allowance, deduct_hydropower_house, special_import_flag ) SELECT #{groupId, jdbcType= BIGINT}, ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ), #{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ), #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, round(( select case when #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} is null then null else case when se_t.employee_category <> '03' and se_t.station <> '驾驶员' then ( select isnull(se.lump_sum_wage,0) + isnull(se.base_pay,0) + isnull(se.post_skill_salary,0) + isnull(se.target_performance_pay, 0) + isnull(se.seniority_allowance, 0) from swm_employee se where se.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 1.5 * #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} else case when right(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 2) <> '01' then (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 1.5 * #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left(swsf.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) else (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 1.5 * #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left( swsf.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) end end end from swm_employee se_t where RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se_t.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se_t.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ),2), round((select case when #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} is null then null else case when se_t.employee_category <> '03' and se_t.station <> '驾驶员' then ( select isnull(se.lump_sum_wage,0) + isnull(se.base_pay,0) + isnull(se.post_skill_salary,0) + isnull(se.target_performance_pay, 0) + isnull(se.seniority_allowance, 0) from swm_employee se where se.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 3 * #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} else case when right(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 2) <> '01' then (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 3 * #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left(swsf.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) else (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 3 * #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left( swsf.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) end end end from swm_employee se_t where RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se_t.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se_t.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ),2),
round(( select case when #{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} is null then null else case when se_t.employee_category <> '03' and se_t.station <> '驾驶员' then ( select isnull(se.lump_sum_wage,0) + isnull(se.base_pay,0) + isnull(se.post_skill_salary,0) + isnull(se.target_performance_pay, 0) + isnull(se.seniority_allowance, 0) from swm_employee se where se.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 2 * #{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} else case when right(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 2) <> '01' then (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 2 * #{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left(swsf.income_period, 4) = left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) else (select (sum(swsf.wages_payable_post) - sum(isnull(swsf.safety_accumulation_award, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.high_temperature_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.transportation_allowance,0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.post_subsidy, 0)) - sum(isnull(swsf.overtime_pay, 0))) / (select count(1) from swm_wage_summary_file swsf_t where left( swsf_t.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf_t.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 )) / 21.75 / 8 * 2 * #{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL} from swm_wage_summary_file swsf where left( swsf.income_period, 4) = convert(varchar(4), (convert(int, left(#{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,4)) - 1)) and swsf.work_card = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) ) end end end from swm_employee se_t where RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se_t.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se_t.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ), 2), 'C', CASE
WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN '工号姓名匹配失败' ELSE case when not exists (select 1 from swm_post_skill_salary spss where spss.enabled_flag = 1 and spss.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isnull(spss.frozen_flag, 0) = 0) then '所得期间已冻结或不存在' else '' END end, CASE
WHEN ( SELECT ISNULL( ( SELECT se.employee_id FROM swm_employee se WHERE RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( se.work_card ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) = RIGHT ( cast( '000000' + rtrim( #{workCard, jdbcType=VARCHAR} ) AS VARCHAR ), 6 ) and se.name = #{employeeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND se.work_flag = 1 ),- 1 ) ) = - 1 THEN 'F' ELSE case when not exists (select 1 from swm_post_skill_salary spss where spss.enabled_flag = 1 and spss.income_period = #{incomePeriod, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and isnull(spss.frozen_flag, 0) = 0) then 'F' else 'T' END END, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{deductIncomeTax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{safetyAccumulationAward, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{highTemperatureSubsidy, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{allowanceDeduction, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{deductOther, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{overtimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{holidayOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{restOvertimePayTime, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{transportationAllowance, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{deductHydropowerHouse, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, 0

insert into swm_post_skill_salary_interface (group_id, employee_id, income_period, work_card, employee_name, overtime_pay, holiday_overtime_pay, rest_overtime_pay, operation_code, error_msg, data_status, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, attribute6, attribute7, attribute8, attribute9, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, deduct_income_tax, safety_accumulation_award, high_temperature_subsidy, allowance_deduction, deduct_other, transportation_allowance,deduct_hydropower_house ) values (#{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{overtimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{holidayOvertimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{restOvertimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute6,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute7,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute8,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute9,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{deductIncomeTax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{safetyAccumulationAward, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{highTemperatureSubsidy, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{allowanceDeduction, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{deductOther, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{transportationAllowance, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{deductHydropowerHouse, jdbcType = DECIMAL} )
mapper.update: update swm_post_skill_salary_interface set group_id = #{groupId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, income_period = #{incomePeriod,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, overtime_pay = #{overtimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, holiday_overtime_pay = #{holidayOvertimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, rest_overtime_pay = #{restOvertimePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, operation_code = #{operationCode,jdbcType=CHAR}, error_msg = #{errorMsg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, data_status = #{dataStatus,jdbcType=CHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute6 = #{attribute6,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute7 = #{attribute7,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute8 = #{attribute8,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute9 = #{attribute9,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, deduct_income_tax = #{deductIncomeTax, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, safety_accumulation_award = #{safetyAccumulationAward, jdbcType = DECIMAL} high_temperature_subsidy = #{highTemperatureSubsidy, jdbcType = DECIMAL} allowance_deduction = #{allowanceDeduction, jdbcType = DECIMAL} deduct_other = #{deductOther, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, transportation_allowance = #{transportationAllowance, jdbcType = DECIMAL} deduct_hydropower_house = #{deductHydropowerHouse, jdbcType = DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
